'''Magon''' was the mother of [[Sleeth (Molavaran)|Sleeth]] and was the reigning [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] of [[Malcraan]], a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Molavar/Legends|Molavar]] around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. She, along with her son, routinely terrorized local farmers. After Sleeth's band was defeated by [[Darca Nyl]] in a raid on [[Byrom]]'s homestead, she responded by bringing out a much larger group of criminals to attack the elderly couple. However, she was thwarted when Darca and a large convoy led by [[Tooth (Molavaran)|Tooth]] arrived, forcing her to retreat.
